heroHeadline: Adidas Stone Slide Pack Revealed as European Tour Leg Opens May 22 in Barcelona
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, a historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance, and Grammy Album of the Year. Adidas x Bad Bunny officially revealed the Stone Slide Pack (5 Puerto Rico cave-inspired colorways, summer 2026) on April 15–17. The "Tracking Bad Bunny" DDB Latina Puerto Rico campaign won the Webby Award for Best Fan Engagement (Apr 21). Cultured magazine profiled the Marías on April 21, highlighting how Bad Bunny's 2022 collaboration launched their trajectory. Spotify monthly listeners: 103.9M. European leg begins May 22, 2026 in Barcelona.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, Pollstar, Bloomberg, NPR, Remezcla, SoleRetriever, and major media
